summary: Quant Lab (AI Quantica) - Complete Testing. Backend: 35/35 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All critical flows working correctly. All 8 API endpoints functional, all 5 UI tabs working with proper data integration.

issues: Minor: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - not blocking

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/quant/indicators returns 11 indicators with id, name, category, default_weight
Backend: GET /api/quant/performance returns total_analyses, signal_distribution (BUY/SELL/HOLD), current_weights (11), experiments_run
Backend: GET /api/quant/rankings returns 11 indicators ranked by accuracy with category badges
Backend: POST /api/quant/backtest returns status, accuracy, win_rate, sharpe_ratio, trades, indicator_rankings
Backend: POST /api/quant/optimize returns optimized_weights, improvement, score (300 iterations)
Backend: GET /api/quant/patterns returns patterns_analyzed, top_patterns, discovery_count
Backend: GET /api/quant/experiments returns experiments list and decisions list with timestamps
Backend: POST /api/quant/reset-weights returns status='reset' with default weights
Frontend: /quant-lab page renders with 'Quant Lab' header and 'JARVIS Autonomous Quantitative Intelligence' subtitle
Frontend: Overview tab shows stat cards (Analyses, Assets, Experiments, Decisions Logged)
Frontend: Overview tab shows Signal Distribution (BUY/SELL/HOLD counts)
Frontend: Overview tab shows Current Model Weights with color-coded bars for all 11 indicators
Frontend: Rankings tab shows 11 indicators sorted by accuracy (#1, #2, etc.) with category badges
Frontend: Backtest tab has 'Run Backtest' button that triggers backtest, shows metrics (accuracy, win_rate, sharpe, P&L)
Frontend: Backtest tab shows recent trades (symbol, predicted vs actual, profit %)
Frontend: Patterns tab loads and shows 'Patterns Analyzed' count, indicator combinations with accuracy/score
Frontend: Log tab shows 'Experiment Log' with type (backtest/optimization/pattern_discovery), timestamps
Frontend: Log tab shows 'Decision Log (IP Protected)' with weight optimization/reset entries
Frontend: Header has 'Backtest' and 'Optimize' buttons that trigger respective operations
Frontend: Sidebar has 'Quant Lab' nav item with Brain icon, highlighted when active
critical_code_review_comments: Backend: Quant Lab service correctly implements INDICATOR_REGISTRY with all 11 indicators
Backend: Backtest, optimize, patterns endpoints properly log experiments to DB
Backend: Decision logs capture weight optimization and resets for IP protection
Frontend: All 5 tabs functional (Overview, Rankings, Backtest, Patterns, Log)
Frontend: Proper data-testid attributes on tabs and buttons for testing
Frontend: Color-coded weight bars and category badges enhance UI clarity
Integration: Analysis history enrichment with quant fields (rsi, macd, structure_bias etc.) working
seed_data_creation: 4 analyses (BTC, ETH, AAPL, NVDA), 22+ experiments, 11+ decision logs in DB
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quant Lab P2 fully tested. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_quant_lab.py. All 8 endpoints working: GET /api/quant/indicators, /performance, /rankings, /patterns, /experiments; POST /api/quant/backtest, /optimize, /reset-weights. Optimize endpoint takes 2-5 seconds (300 iterations). Test user has 4 analyses feeding quant data. DB collections: quant_experiments, quant_decision_logs, quant_weights, analysis_history (with quant enrichment fields).

mocked_components.note: Market data uses real APIs with smart fallback to generated candles when insufficient data

rca_of_the_issue: N/A - No issues found. All Quant Lab features working correctly.
